subcodes.first_line: O Ahmad! Hearken thou unto the Voice of God from the direction of Divine Decree. Verily, there is none other God but Me, the Mighty, the All-Wise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا احمد ان استمع ندآء الله من شطر القضا انه لا اله الا انا العزیز الحکیم
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @personal instructions, @wisdom [hikmat], @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
